ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "city" TEXT /* City within the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State within which the city is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code for the region */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "home_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the price is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the price is recorded */,
  "price" REAL /* Home price for the given date */,
  "diff" INTEGER /* Difference in price from the previous date */,
  "pct" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous date */,
  "num_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms */,
  "num_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms */,
  "sqft" INTEGER /* Square footage */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, condo, townhouse) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_home_prices_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_shifts" (
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shift entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the shift is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the shift is recorded */,
  "shift" INTEGER /* 5-year shift in home price */,
  "avg_annual_increase" REAL /* Average annual increase in home price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shift_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_shifts_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the return is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the return is recorded */,
  "return" REAL /* 5-year return on investment */,
  "gross_yield" REAL /* Gross yield (i.e., rental income / purchase price) */,
  "appreciation" REAL /* Appreciation (i.e., increase in property value) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the trend is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the trend is recorded */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Description of the market trend or pattern */,
  "seasonality" TEXT /* Seasonality (e.g., summer, winter, holiday season) */,
  "anomaly" INTEGER /* Whether the trend is an anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization to which the user belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "pref_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each preference entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user for whom the preference is recorded */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the preference is recorded */,
  "price_range" TEXT /* Price range for which the user is interested */,
  "num_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Minimum number of bedrooms preferred by the user */,
  "num_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Minimum number of bathrooms preferred by the user */,
  "min_sqft" INTEGER /* Minimum square footage preferred by the user */,
  "max_sqft" INTEGER /* Maximum square footage preferred by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pref_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., search, save, share) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date on which the interaction occurred */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region related to the interaction */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the price entry related to the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES home_prices ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)
